---
title: "MA: Critical Theory and Cultural Studies"
subtitle: "University of Nottingham, 2003--2004"
---

## Overview

| | |
|---|---|
| **Degree** | MA Critical Theory and Cultural Studies |
| **Classification** | Distinction |
| **Institution** | University of Nottingham |
| **Year** | 2003--2004 |
| **Dissertation** | "Richard Rorty and the New Left" |

## Coursework modules

| Module | Title | Mark | Credits |
|--------|-------|------|---------|
| L64001 | Cultural Studies: Theory and Practice | 58 | 30 |
| V9D002 | Social and Political Theories | 67 | 30 |
| V9D003 | Postmodernisms | 57 | 30 |
| V9D015 | Thought, Image and Critique | 59 | 30 |
| V9D016 | Dissertation in Cultural Studies and Critical Theory | 68 | 60 |

## Dissertation

The MA dissertation, "Richard Rorty and the New Left," is not currently available in the digital archive. A physical copy may exist and is being sought. If recovered, it will be digitised and added here.

::: {.callout-note}
## Looking for this document
The dissertation examined Richard Rorty's pragmatist philosophy in relation to the New Left political tradition. If you are reading this and happen to have a copy (perhaps from the University of Nottingham library), please [get in touch](https://jonminton.net/contact).
:::

## Downloads

[Download Thesis280406.doc (36KB, pre-PhD research document)](../downloads/Thesis280406-MA-PrePhD.doc){.download-btn}

**Source format:** Microsoft Word (.doc) from CD-ROM backup, April 2006.

## Context

The MA in Critical Theory and Cultural Studies was completed between the BEng in Electronic Engineering (2003) and the PhD in Sociology and Human Geography (2005--2009). It represents a significant intellectual pivot — from engineering through continental philosophy and cultural theory towards the social sciences.

An extended research document from this transition period, "Simulating Geographies of Homelessness and Worklessness" (April 2006), survives in the archive. It represents an early direction for the PhD and is presented as an [optional appendix under the PhD section](../phd/early-direction/index.qmd).
